entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum (L.) R. Br., a crop whose stover is used for livestock feed

entities.name: LIVESTOCK
entities.description: Animals that rely on crop residues for dry-season maintenance rations

entities.name: CROP-LIVESTOCK PRODUCTION SYSTEMS
entities.description: Traditional smallholder systems integrating crop and livestock production

entities.name: THAR DESERT
entities.description: A semi-arid region in South Asia

entities.name: SOUTH ASIA
entities.description: The geographic region containing the Thar desert

entities.name: SAHELIAN REGION
entities.description: A region in West and Central Africa

entities.name: WEST AND CENTRAL AFRICA
entities.description: The geographic region containing the Sahelian region

entities.name: CROP RESIDUES
entities.description: Plant materials remaining after harvest, specifically stover in this context

entities.name: MARGINAL ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: Environments where crop residues typically have poor nutritional value

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL VALUE
entities.description: The quality and content of nutrients in crop residues

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL SUPPLEMENTS
entities.description: Additives used to enhance the feed quality of crop residues

entities.name: GENETIC ENHANCEMENT
entities.description: An approach to permanently improve the nutritional quality of crop residues

entities.name: STOVER QUALITY TRAITS
entities.description: Complex traits related to the nutritional and feed value of pearl millet stover

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL BREEDING
entities.description: Traditional breeding methods used for trait selection

entities.name: WET-LAB ANALYSIS
entities.description: Tedious and time-consuming laboratory analysis of nutritional value

entities.name: GENOMIC REGIONS
entities.description: Specific areas of the genome associated with particular traits

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED BACKCROSSING
entities.description: A breeding method (MABC) used to improve feed value in elite hybrids and parental lines

entities.name: ELITE HYBRIDS
entities.description: High-performing hybrid varieties of pearl millet

entities.name: PARENTAL LINES
entities.description: The genetic lines used to produce hybrids

entities.name: GENETIC VARIABILITY
entities.description: The presence of variation for specific traits within a population

entities.name: STOVER YIELD
entities.description: The quantity of stover produced by the crop

entities.name: CELL WALL DIGESTIBILITY
entities.description: A specific component of stover quality traits

entities.name: MAPPING POPULATION
entities.description: A population developed for genetic mapping, specifically based on the ICMB 841 x 863B cross

entities.name: ICMB 841 X 863B
entities.description: The specific cross used to develop the mapping population

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to withstand drought conditions

entities.name: FLOWERING TIME
entities.description: The duration until the plant reaches the flowering stage

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: The vertical growth measurement of the plant

entities.name: AGRONOMIC ELITENESS
entities.description: The overall high agronomic performance of the plant

entities.name: QTL MAPPING
entities.description: The process of identifying quantitative trait loci associated with specific traits

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: A method (MAS) using genetic markers to select for desired traits
